title: [Skyship, Core]
description: A giant metal furnace sits to one side of a walkway emitting a constant stream of thick, black smoke from a wide grating attached to its front.  Across from the furnace, gear-set panels and stout, smoke-belching pipes line one of the bulkheads, which rattles with the constant motion of the gears.  The path below radiates warmth and steam rises from it across the area.  Above, dark metal pipes attached to the furnace travel along the ceiling into the distance while they shake with a low, ever-present hum.
